comments.LineComment: | Renders Hydrogen Elements to Halogen HTML for use in Halogen applications.
| This bridges the pure Element abstraction to Halogen's reactive runtime.
| Hydrogen event handlers are converted to Halogen's event system:
| myComponent :: forall w. HH.HTML w MyAction
| myComponent = TH.toHalogen (E.button_ [ E.onClick Click ] [ E.text "Click me" ])
| This enables using Hydrogen's 96 Element Compounds in Halogen applications:
